precipitation_input_convention: interval accumulation in metres assigned at each timestamp; no interpolation across missing values

time_constants.source: Zhang et al. 2026 Haikou VOR method contract: tau1=1 h and tau2=720 h

fast_fraction_gate: must be obtained from the full method/equations or fitted only on declared training events with held-out sensitivity

gravity_mapping.vertical_convention: local up positive; added water below sensor is negative
